title: The Lurker Remastered
description: A horror mod with many new features
body:
A brand new and original idea!

This mod is not linked to any cave dweller whatsover but it is marked as a dweller. In other words, this creature likes to lurk in forests, waiting for its prey, and then the rest is up to you to discover.

This mod contains a new biome, new mechanics, a monster, and new items.

This project is a solo project, I will bring horror, technology and adventure in 1 mod.

This terrifying mod will bring you and your friends to uncover new biomes, temples and fight back, unless you die.

This mods purpose is to scare people and make an enjoyable experience for all.

Thanks for playing!
